subcodes.first_line: Say: All praise be unto Thee, O Lord of existence and Educator of the seen and unseen, inasmuch as Thou hast transformed the fire of my heedlessness into light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل لک الحمد یا مالک الوجود و مربی الغیب و الشهود بما بدلت نار غفلتی بنور
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement
